nasb.text: And Jesus said to them, “Do you suppose that these Galileans were greater sinners than all other Galileans because they suffered this fate?

esv.text: And he answered them, “Do you think that these Galileans were worse sinners than all the other Galileans, because they suffered in this way?

cnv.text: 他回答：“你們以為這些加利利人比其他的加利利人更有罪，才這樣受害嗎？

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“你们以为这些人被杀，是因为他们的罪比其他加利利人的罪更重吗？

csbs.text: 耶稣回答他们，说：“你们以为这些加利利人如此受害，是因为他们比其他所有加利利人更有罪吗？
